mapper.select: SELECT o.order_no AS order_no, o.status AS status, o.ordered_name AS ordered_name, o.total AS total, o.tracking_no AS tracking_no, o.ship_company AS ship_company, o.ordered_at AS ordered_at FROM ORDERS o WHERE o.order_no = #{orderNo} AND o.ordered_name = #{orderedName} LIMIT 1

SELECT gi.id AS id, gi.name AS name, gi.price AS price, gi.stock AS stock, gi.sold_out AS sold_out FROM GOODS_ITEM gi WHERE gi.use_yn = 'Y' AND gi.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY gi.sale_count DESC, gi.id DESC LIMIT #{size}
